creator: stenn@nwtime.org
text:
For a while now (mponths, maybe a year), every prebuilt package version of ipmitool I've tried coredumps when I try and access a remote IPMI port with -I lanplus.

This happens with ipmitool-1.8.17_1.

If I build the package from source it works just fine.

The base OS is up-to-date:

 10.3-RELEASE-p11 FreeBSD 10.3-RELEASE-p11 #0: Mon Oct 24 18:49:24 UTC 2016     root@amd64-builder.daemonology.net:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64
